---
title: "FLORA PubPeer - author emails"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

pacman::p_load(chromote, rvest, dplyr, stringr, httr,tidyverse,readr,dotenv, httr, jsonlite, xml2, rvest, stringr, purrr, tibble, dplyr)
```

## Load the converter

```{r}
source("flora_converter.R")
source("scrape_emails.R")
source("scrape_emails_v2.R")
```

# load data convert
```{r}

data <- csv_to_flora_json("flora.csv")
df   <- flora_json_to_df(data)
 
# clean up FLoRA
# remove uninformative and APA ref NAs
table(df$outcome)
df <- df %>% filter(outcome!= "unclear") %>% filter(outcome != "uninformative")
df <- df %>% filter(!(is.na(apa_ref_r)))

#remove source that is not in main article
table(df$outcome_quote_source)

df <- df %>%
  filter(!stringr::str_detect(outcome_quote_source, 
    regex("supplementary material|materials|github|\\bSM\\b|table|appendix", 
          ignore_case = TRUE)))

length(unique(df$doi_o))

```

#email function
```{r}

doi_orig <- df %>% distinct(doi_o)
#scrape 1
result_v2 <- purrr::map(doi_orig$doi_o, purrr::possibly(
  \(doi) get_email_v2(doi),
  otherwise = tibble::tibble(doi = NA_character_, emails = NA_character_, source = NA_character_)
)) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()


View(result_v2)

doi_missing <- result_v2 %>% filter(is.na(emails))

results_add <- purrr::map(doi_missing$doi, purrr::possibly(
  \(doi) get_email_main(doi, debug_if_none = FALSE),
  otherwise = tibble::tibble(url = NA_character_, emails = NA_character_, extraction_method = NA_character_)
)) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()
View(results_add)

results_emails <- rbind(result_v2,results)

write.csv(results,"emails_authors.csv")


```


#test with unpaywall added 
```{r}



result_v2 <- purrr::map(doi_to_get$url, purrr::possibly(
  \(doi) get_email_v2(doi),
  otherwise = tibble::tibble(doi = NA_character_, emails = NA_character_, source = NA_character_)
)) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()


View(result_v2)

```
